creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
I already submitted a fix in ports/185611, but it takes some time to 
process PRs.

The upstream up/down/up-ed the primary mirror and re-rolled a distfile 
while at it,
all within a space of a couple of days. The fix should be committed soon.
Meanwhile, you can download a patch from that PR page.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/185611

- Nikolai Lifanov
